errorPage.accessRestricted.title: Access restricted
errorPage.accessRestricted.description: Sorry, you do not have permission to access this page. Contact an administrator for assistance.
errorPage.accessRestricted.action: Switch accounts or contact an administrator to expand your access scope.
errorPage.notFound.title: Page not found
errorPage.notFound.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for has been moved or does not exist.
errorPage.notFound.action: Check that the link is complete, or go back to the home page.
errorPage.serverError.title: Service error
errorPage.serverError.description: Sorry, the server encountered an issue. Please try again later.
errorPage.serverError.action: Try again later; if the issue persists, submit the error context.
errorPage.maintenance.title: Service unavailable
errorPage.maintenance.description: The system is under maintenance. Please try again later.
errorPage.maintenance.action: Wait for maintenance to complete and refresh the page.
errorBoundary.title: Component error
